steps.title: Set the function equal
steps.content: The question asks when $f(x)=180$. Since the function is defined by $f(x)=45x$, set the expression equal to $180$: $$45x=180$$

steps.title: Divide by the coefficient
steps.content: Divide both sides by $45$ to isolate $x$: $$x=\frac{180}{45}$$ $$x=4$$ The answer is 4.
